title: Mountain Paws USB Rechargeable LED Dog Collar | Water Resistant, 4 Colours and Flashing Mode for Visibility | Cut to Size to Fit Any Dog
features: SUITABLE FOR ALL BREEDS - This collar can be cut to size to fit any dog, large, medium, or small. Our clever Rechargeable LED safety collar will save the hassle of trying to get the size right. Whether you have a small Frenchie or a large Labrador, our light up collar is the perfect choice

HIGH VISIBILITY – Nothing matters more than your dog’s safety and this Mountain Paws Coller offers lighting in 4 colours – White, Purple, Blue and Red, each with a flashing mode to ensure your dog will be highly visible to walkers, joggers, cyclists, motorists and more – it’s an essential accessory for walking in dark winter mornings and evenings

EASY TO CLEAN – Designed for use through the autumn and winter collar is made from silicone for easy cleaning and it won’t get smelly after all those wet, muddy wintery walks. Built with the high-quality materials and components, our weatherproof collar is water-resistant, has rust-proof components, is lightweight, strong, durable & built to last

USB-C RECHARGEABLE: Fast charging in only 1.5 hours via USB and a long battery life of up to 16 hours in flashing mode and 8 hours in constant mode, this collar is the perfect choice for active dogs and active owners

EASY TO USE: Super easy to operate through a single button: One Click to turn on and Long Press to turn off. CHARGING: A red light indicates that charging is in progress, and a green light indicates when the collar is fully charged. If the collar is plugged in to charge while it is turned on, it will automatically power off
description: Product Description Light up every walk with the Mountain Paws Rechargeable LED Dog Collar, designed to keep your dog safe and visible in low light. The built-in LED light offers four different colour options with both constant and flashing modes, to ensure maximum visibility whether you are out on the trails, in the park or walking on roads. The collar is made from a flexible silicone strap that’s comfortable, durable, and water-resistant, so it’s ready for use in any weather. It can also be cut to size to perfectly fit any dog and recharged quickly via USB-C, so it is always ready to keep your pet visible and safe Directions One Click to turn on and Long Press to turn off. CHARGING: A red light indicates that charging is in progress, and a green light indicates when the collar is fully charged. If the collar is plugged in to charge while it is turned on, it will automatically power off Wipe Clean
